title: narcissus lacticolor
intro: Narcissus lacticolor, also known as the white-flowered narcissus, is a perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its white flowers and sweet fragrance. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, with its bulbs containing alkaloids, which have been shown to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Narcissus lacticolor include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Narcissus lacticolor include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create remedies for various health conditions.
